description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from Spider-Man. Featuring an attractive print on its footbed, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park. Product Details Green flip-flops with attractive print and branding on footbed Black and green thong style straps with brand badge Foamy rubber footbed TPU outsole with patterned nubs, upraised heel Material and Care Rubber, TPU  Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust  Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from Spider-Man.
